validate.notes: Harness-level failure: Bash tool unusable in this session. Every Bash invocation (including `echo test`) errors with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'` before the command runs. A subagent reproduced the same failure, confirming this is environmental, not command-specific. No way from inside the session to run `mkdir`/`chown` to fix it. Cannot perform docker build, NOP test, gold test, or rubric judge. Task files inspected via Read look correct: solve.sh patches HttpParser.h with bloom-filter + header-iteration + strncmp + RFC reference + HTTP_PARSER_ERROR_INVALID_CONTENT_LENGTH; adds scripts/pr-comments.ts; updates package.json scripts; appends 'Reading PR Feedback' to CLAUDE.md — all of which line up with the assertions in tests/test_outputs.py, so validation would likely pass once Bash works. Needs the host to chown/chmod /home/worker/.claude before the next attempt.
